content_gaps.description: Live dubstep/bass music content and DJ transitions. Competitors running dedicated bass/dubstep content but LIV focusing primarily on house and tech.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Feature underground bass DJs or dubstep artists in Stories/Reels to capture emerging trend

content_gaps.description: Reposting guest videos and testimonials. Competitors actively resharing guest content from Stories/Reels.
